upasargachandrika.example_text: 'ava smayanta vidyutaH pfTivyAm' (f0 11688) avANmuKaM prakASanta ityAha
'uBayorna taTA lokaH prAvIRyena visizmiye' (raGu0 1568) visizmiye=vismayamApa sAScaryo baBUva
'na vismayeta tapasA' (manu0 4236) na vismayet na dfpyet na garvayeta
'vIryavAn na ca vIryeRa mahatA svena vismitaH' (rA0 2113) vismito garvitaH
'SamIjAtaM tu taM dfzwvA aSvatTaM vismitastadA' (hari0 12644) vismito vismayAnvitaH
'utsmayantastadA pArTamidaM vacanamabruvan' (BA0 vana0 24413) smitaM kurvanta ityarTaH ucCandaH smitasya prAkawyamAha
'utsmayanpraRataH prAha kuntIM vEkartano vfzaH' (BA0) utsmayan utpannavismayaH
'AdAya SuklAmbaramAlyadAma jagAma kuntI sutamutsmayantI' (BA0 18827) (uttamapatilABAd) atyantaM garvaM kurvatI
'lokAnsa mAM vyasfjadutsmayantIM tadante' (BA0 pu0 11633) utsmayantIm=aBimAninIm utsmayo vismayaH smayo garvaH
'tadA sma mantraM sahitAH pracakru strElokyanASArTamaBismayantaH' (BA0 310119) tridaSAnAmupari smayamAnA asurAH
